sessionStart.bash: echo "[AI Agent KIT] Session started at $(date)" >> .ai-agent-kit/session.log
sessionStart.powershell: Add-Content -Path .ai-agent-kit/session.log -Value "[AI Agent KIT] Session started at $(Get-Date)"

preToolUse.bash: echo "[AI Agent KIT] Tool used: $COPILOT_TOOL_NAME at $(date)" >> .ai-agent-kit/audit.log
preToolUse.powershell: Add-Content -Path .ai-agent-kit/audit.log -Value "[AI Agent KIT] Tool used: $env:COPILOT_TOOL_NAME at $(Get-Date)"

sessionEnd.bash: echo "[AI Agent KIT] Session ended at $(date)" >> .ai-agent-kit/session.log
sessionEnd.powershell: Add-Content -Path .ai-agent-kit/session.log -Value "[AI Agent KIT] Session ended at $(Get-Date)"
